title: Unorthodox Space Travel
description: A ModPack About Twisting Reality in the most bizarre ways
body:
Have you EVER wanted to do the following things?:
- Create a black hole
- Turn matter into data on a hard drive
- Mutate and augment your body till you can no longer be considered human
- Create portals to alien planets
- Open a rift in reality to a nuclear heaven

Well you are in luck! Because all of that (and more) is possible in unorthodox space travel!

[Join the discord!](https://discord.gg/2HqSKFxM6R)

Prominent mods Include
- [Immersive engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
- [Toxony](https://modrinth.com/mod/toxony)
- [Oritech](https://modrinth.com/mod/oritech)
- [Stargate Journey](https://modrinth.com/mod/sgjourney)
